DISCOVERY 610, AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING IS VACATED AND PLAINTIFF MINA GURALNIK'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. COMPLIANCE BY MARCH 21, 2008. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $790 AS TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM MAR-21-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-07-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE MATTER TO APRIL 7, 2008. COURT OVERRULES DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE POLLACK DECLARATION. REGARDING DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE MOTION, COURT ORDERS THAT DEFENDANT IS TO FILE A DECLARATION BY MARCH 27, 2008 CLARIFYING THE FOLLOWING ISSUES: (1)WHEN WAS THE SUBJECT OF FILING AN AMENDED ANSWER FIRST DISCUSSED WITH FARMERS? (2)WHEN WAS THE SUBJECT OF FILING A CROSS-COMPLAINT FIRST DISCUSSED? (3)WHAT FACTS FORMED THE BASIS OF FARMERS' REQUEST TO FILE AN AMENDED ANSWER IN NOVEMBER, 2007? (4)WHAT FACTS NOW FORMS THE BASIS OF FARMERS' TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT? AND, (5)WHEN WERE FACTS LEARNED (SEE #4)? PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE THEIR RESPONSE BY APRIL 2, 2008. NOTICE IS WAIVED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: KATHY KOLLEHNER, CSR #4102

APPEARANCES: LOUISE ABRONSON, ESQUIRE (408.687.9155) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ROBERT M. PETERSON, ESQUIRE (CARLSON CALLADINE & PETERSON, 415.391.8755) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS' TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE MATTER TO APRIL 7, 2008. COURT OVERRULES DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE POLLACK DECLARATION. REGARDING DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE MOTION, COURT ORDERS THAT DEFENDANT IS TO FILE A DECLARATION BY MARCH 27, 2008 CLARIFYING THE FOLLOWING ISSUES: (1) WHEN WAS THE SUBJECT OF FILING AN AMENDED ANSWER FIRST DISCUSSED WITH FARMERS? (2) WHEN WAS THE SUBJECT OF FILING A CROSS-COMPLAINT FIRST DISCUSSED? (3) WHAT FACTS FORMED THE BASIS OF FARMERS' REQUEST TO FILE AN AMENDED ANSWER IN NOVEMBER, 2007? (4) WHAT FACTS NOW FORMS THE BASIS OF FARMERS' TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT? AND, (5) WHEN WERE FACTS LEARNED (SEE #4)? PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE THEIR RESPONSE BY APRIL 2, 2008. NOTICE IS WAIVED. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: KATHY KOLLEHNER, CSR 4102
